ORDER OF EXAMINATION MAY-10-2018 - DISCHARGED WITHOUT COSTS PURSUANT TO SAN FRANCISCO SUPERIOR COURT LOCAL RULE 8.9E AS TO DEFENDANT JESSICA ALVAREZ. NO APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF BANK OF STOCKTON. DEFENDANT JESSICA ALVAREZ WAS PRESENT IN PRO PER, PLACED UNDER OATH BUT DID NOT TESTIFY. COURT CERTIFIED SPANISH SPEAKING INTERPRETER MANTI HENRIQUEZ ASSISTED MS. ALVAREZ DURING THIS AFTERNOON'S PROCEEDINGS. PROOF OF SERVICE OF THE OEX ON FILE. PROCEEDINGS NOT REPORTED. JUDGE: CYNTHIA MING-MEI LEE. CLERK: K. DOUGHERTY. (D514).
